The '''Trade Federation Superfreighter''', or '''TF Superfreighter''', was an armed [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] used by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] around the time of the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]]. This model was an advanced version of the [[Trade Federation Freighter]] also in use at the time. The class would continue to be used during the lead-in to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Characteristics==
The [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Freighter/Legends|Superfreighter]] was an elongated, white-hulled vessel boasting powerful [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shields]] and a reinforced hull. It was armed with two [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]] turrets, and usually escorted by [[Scarab-class starfighter/Legends|''Scarab'' starfighters]].<ref name="Star Wars: Starfighter" />

==History==
The [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] [[Nym/Legends|Nym]] engaged several Superfreighters during his attacks against [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] forces in the [[Karthakk system]] prior<ref name="Star Wars: Starfighter" /> to the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]] in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' establishes that the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]] happens in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].</ref> His pirate crew [[Battle of Lok (32 BBY)|disabled]] a Superfreighter above [[Lok/Legends|Lok]], then looted its cargo after the vessel crash-landed on the [[Planet/Legends|planet's surface]].[[File:TF_super_SWS.jpg|thumb|right|240px|A TF Superfreighter on [[Lok/Legends|Lok]].]] Later, [[Vana Sage]] led an [[Skirmish over Naboo|assault]] against a freighter convoy over Naboo, during which [[Reti]] infiltrated a Superfreighter and reprogrammed its complement of ''Scarab'' fighters to assist Sage's pilots. This aided greatly in breaking the blockade, allowing Vana and her team to continue their mission planet-side.<ref name="Star Wars: Starfighter" />

The Federation continued to use the Superfreighters in its [[Merchant/Legends|trading fleet]] up to and including the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. A number of Superfreighters were involved in the project to produce [[Trihexalon]] on the planet [[Nod Kartha]] by the [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] [[Sabaoth Squadron/Legends|Sabaoth Squadron]].<ref name="Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Superfreighters first appeared in the [[2001]] video game [[Star Wars: Starfighter (video game)|''Star Wars: Starfighter'']].
